Title: View localized home and navigation
Manual_Test_Notes: Manual: open /fr home; header/footer/nav visible; open contact; submit valid form. Visual spot-check mobile 390px, tablet 768px, desktop 1280px. Contact spam/rate-limit if enabled.

Title: Browse shop and category product listings
Manual_Test_Notes: Manual: shop listing loads; category filter; pagination; magazine article → product link. Large catalog performance on staging; empty category edge cases.

Title: Open product detail from slug
Manual_Test_Notes: Manual: open PDP from shop; images, price, title, ATC; related products; invalid slug 404; OOS product shows unavailable (admin fixture if used).

Title: Search and sort catalog
Manual_Test_Notes: Manual: header search → result → PDP; nonsense query → no results; sort price asc/desc matches catalog rules on staging.

Title: Add line to cart from PDP
Manual_Test_Notes: Manual: add to cart; drawer opens; qty +/- ; remove line; refresh page — cart persists; header badge count correct.

Title: Guest checkout shipping quote
Manual_Test_Notes: Manual: guest checkout address → shipping methods listed; pick alternate method; empty/invalid fields blocked. Carrier totals vs business rules on staging.

Title: Promo code
Manual_Test_Notes: Manual only: valid promo at checkout — discount applied; invalid/expired code — localized error; promo + free-shipping edge — totals match admin rules.

Title: Cash on delivery order
Manual_Test_Notes: Manual: one COD order on staging; thank-you reference visible; order appears in admin with correct lines (automation uses prod — manual sign-off on staging first).

Title: CMI card flow
Manual_Test_Notes: Manual only: CMI sandbox — guest checkout redirects to CMI; complete payment — clear success; simulate failure/cancel — retry without loop; return URL has no secrets.

Title: Thank you page reference
Manual_Test_Notes: Manual: after order, thank-you shows reference; confirmation email content and timing.

Title: FR/EN storefront
Automated_Playwright: code-first/e2e/locale-switch.spec.ts; code-first/e2e/currency-switch.spec.ts; code-first/e2e/seo-meta.spec.ts; Playwright projects fr+en
Manual_Test_Notes: Manual: switch FR/EN and currency; URLs and labels update; marketing copy natural; OG/meta spot-check when sharing PDP/article.

Title: Brand from API
Manual_Test_Notes: Manual: logo and brand colors on devices; no flash of wrong brand on slow network.

Title: Admin login
Manual_Test_Notes: Manual only: admin UI login/logout on staging; invalid credentials.

Title: Products and stock
Manual_Test_Notes: Manual only: product CRUD; image upload; stock change reflects on storefront PDP.

Title: Orders operations
Manual_Test_Notes: Manual only: order filters; status update; CSV export on large dataset.

Title: Shipping and settings
Manual_Test_Notes: Manual only: shipping method CRUD; settings validation; role permissions.

Title: CI pipeline
Manual_Test_Notes: Manual: verify QA CI green on PR; QA Nightly smoke+e2e schedule; Allure reports on GitHub Pages.

Title: Test coverage map
Manual_Test_Notes: Manual: each P0 story has Manual_Test_Notes; automated paths linked when stable.

Title: Staging parity
Manual_Test_Notes: Manual: run smoke/e2e against staging URLs; DNS/TLS/cookies; default PDP in stock.
